title: Recall Case
description: Recall Case v1 contract for impact, hold, sale lock, recovery, disposition, and CAPA based on the trace chain.
$comment: Sources: PACK-01 Recall/Recovery/Disposition/CAPA. TODO: full recall severity and transition model is not finalized.

batch_id.description: Affected batch when scoped to batch.

impact_snapshot.description: Impact snapshot. TODO: define exact exposure fields from trace/commerce documents.

sale_lock_id.description: Sale lock created from this recall when applicable.

recovery_status.description: Recovery status. TODO: define official values.

disposition_status.description: Disposition status. PACK-03 disposal statuses may apply to material/write-off flows.
